name: Lemon Mousse with Raspberry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 10oz. pkg frozen raspberries, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, sprinkle gelatin over white wine and let soften.
2. Add lemon juice and grated lemon rind, stir over simmering water until gelatin is dissolved.
3. In another bowl, beat egg yolks with 3 tablespoons of sugar until the mixture ribbons. Slowly add the gelatin mixture and stir.
4. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until foamy. Add 5 tablespoons of sugar and beat until the meringue holds soft peaks.
5. Add whipped cream to the egg yolk mixture and fold in one half of the meringue. Add the remaining meringue and gently fold together.
6. Chill the mousse for at least 2 hours.
7. For the sauce, combine thawed and drained raspberries, lemon juice, sugar, and Kirsch in a blender or food processor. Puree, strain to remove seeds, and add enough reserved raspberry juice to slightly thin.
To serve, spoon the mousse onto plates and pass the sauce on the side.
